title: Weighted Graph
description: Interactive visualization of weighted graphs showing edge distances between US metropolitan cities. Demonstrates how to create a k-nearest-neighbors graph with distance weights.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Weighted Graphs
Edge Weights
K-Nearest Neighbors
Graph Visualization
Geographic Networks
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of weighted graph
Explore weighted graph through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of weighted graph to solve problems
Test understanding of weighted graph through interactive exercises
